description: MVP prototype for persona-based AI chatbot with three Scaler personalities

features.name: Persona System Prompts
features.description: Create distinct system prompts for each of the three personas with persona description, few-shot examples, CoT instruction, output format, and constraints
tasks: Research Anshuman Singh, Abhimanyu Saxena, and Kshitij Mishra personas
Write system prompt for Anshuman Singh with all required components
Write system prompt for Abhimanyu Saxena with all required components
Write system prompt for Kshitij Mishra with all required components

features.name: LLM API Integration
features.description: Backend API endpoint to call LLM with persona-specific system prompts
tasks: Set up API route with environment variable for API key (use packages/env)
Implement chat API using @ai-sdk/google
Pass correct system prompt based on selected persona
Handle API errors gracefully with user-friendly messages

features.name: Chat Interface
features.description: Frontend chat UI with message display and input
tasks: Create chat message list component
Create message input component
Display user and bot messages with distinct styling
Auto-scroll to latest message

features.name: Persona Switcher
features.description: UI to switch between three personas with conversation reset
tasks: Create persona selector (tabs or buttons)
Show active persona clearly in UI
Reset conversation when persona switches
Load correct system prompt on switch

features.name: Suggestion Chips
tasks: Define suggestion chips for each persona
Display chips below persona selector
Click chip to populate input and send message

features.name: Typing Indicator
features.description: Visual feedback while API call is in progress
tasks: Show typing indicator during API call
Hide indicator when response received
Handle error state display

features.name: Mobile Responsiveness
features.description: Ensure app works on mobile and desktop
tasks: Make chat interface responsive
Ensure persona selector works on mobile
Test touch interactions

features.name: Environment Configuration
features.description: Set up environment variables for API key management
tasks: Check existing packages/env for environment variable setup
Add GOOGLE_API_KEY to .env.example if not present
Ensure no API keys are hardcoded in source
Document setup in README

milestones.name: MVP Complete
milestones.description: Working chatbot with persona switching and API integration

milestones.name: Enhanced UX
milestones.description: Suggestion chips, typing indicator, and mobile responsiveness
